texto: Surely the shortest commencement address in history - and for me one of the most memorable - was that of Dr. Harold E. Hyde President of New Hampshire's Plymouth State College. He reduced his message to the graduating class to these three ideals: 'Know yourself- Socrates. Control yourself- Cicero Give yourself - Christ.'
explicacao: Citação de Walter T. Tatara sobre temas ligados a educacao. “Surely the shortest commencement address in history - and for me one of the most memorable - was …” articula educacao, education, reflexao em registro de educacao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
